_comment: M&M 3e conditions and damage track — from the d20 Hero SRD (OGL)

degrees_of_success.note: Check >= DC = 1 degree of success. Each +5 above DC = +1 degree. Check < DC = 1 degree of failure. Each -5 below DC = +1 degree of failure.

failure_1.effect: -1 cumulative penalty to further Toughness checks

failure_2.effect: Dazed until end of next turn AND -1 cumulative Toughness penalty

failure_3.effect: Staggered AND -1 cumulative Toughness penalty. If already staggered, Incapacitated.

damage_resistance.cumulative_penalty_note: The -1 penalties to Toughness are cumulative. Three failed checks with 1 degree each = total -3 penalty.

compelled.name: Compelled
compelled.effect: Limited to free actions and a single standard action per turn chosen by the controller

controlled.name: Controlled
controlled.effect: No free will; all actions dictated by controller

dazed.name: Dazed
dazed.effect: Limited to free actions and a single standard action per turn

debilitated.name: Debilitated
debilitated.effect: One or more abilities reduced below -5

defenseless.name: Defenseless
defenseless.effect: Active defense bonuses are 0. Attackers can make routine checks. Hits are treated as critical hits.

fatigued.name: Fatigued
fatigued.effect: Hindered. Recovers after 1 hour of rest.

immobile.name: Immobile
immobile.effect: No movement speed; cannot move from current position

stunned.name: Stunned
stunned.effect: Cannot take any actions, including free actions

transformed.name: Transformed
transformed.effect: Some or all traits altered by an outside agency

unaware.name: Unaware
unaware.effect: Completely unaware of surroundings; all targets have total concealment from you

vulnerable.name: Vulnerable
vulnerable.effect: Active defenses halved (round up final value)

weakened.name: Weakened
weakened.effect: Temporarily lost character points in a trait

asleep.name: Asleep
asleep.note: Essentially helpless. Wakes from damage or sudden stimulus.

bound.name: Bound
bound.note: Physically restrained and unable to move

dying.name: Dying
dying.note: Near death. Fortitude check DC 15 each round; failure = death. Stabilize with Treatment DC 15.

entranced.name: Entranced
entranced.note: Fascinated; takes no actions but not helpless. Ends on threat or hostile action.

paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
paralyzed.note: Physically unable to move but may still be aware (unlike incapacitated)

prone.name: Prone
prone.effect: -5 circumstance penalty on close attack checks. Opponents get +5 close attack bonus. +5 bonus vs ranged attacks.
prone.note: Lying on ground; stand up costs move action (or free with Instant Up)

restrained.name: Restrained
restrained.note: Partially held; can still act but with difficulty

staggered.name: Staggered
staggered.note: Limited actions and slowed. Second stagger = incapacitated.

surprised.name: Surprised
surprised.note: Caught off guard; lasts until first action

affliction_conditions_by_degree._note: When building an Affliction, choose one condition from each degree. Resistance: Fortitude or Will vs DC 10 + rank.
